title: Time in a bottle
body:
![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1032/451/timy-whimy-stuff.png)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/834300742864601088?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&labelColor=grey&color=green)](https://discord.mangorage.org) [![Support me on Patreon](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fshieldsio-patreon.vercel.app%2Fapi%3Fusername%3DMangoRage%26type%3Dpatrons&style=for-the-badge)](https://patreon.com/MangoRage) [![GitHub Repo stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/RealMangorage/time-in-a-bottle?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/RealMangorage/time-in-a-bottle)

Use Code MangoRage to get 20% off any purchase \
https://sodiumhosting.com/mangorage

Tired of waiting for your ore to finally finish smelting? Are you starving to death while watching your wheat grow? Growing tired of watching (theoretical) paint dry? Stop wasting time and start using Time In A Bottle! Just click any tickable block, like a furnace, crops, brewing stand, and more!

## Features

- Accelerate how fast blocks are ticked!
- Passively collect time
- Easy to use admin command
- Curio and keybind support with the [TIAB Curio Support Mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/time-in-a-bottle-curio-support)
- Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge support! (1.20.6+)

Super fast furnace

![Furnace](https://cdn.imjustdoom.com/images/ae0f5b1e-2d6b-4c91-9840-775d8e4edb8f/output3.gif)

Crafting recipe

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/pdP1AaJ.gif)

Use commands to add/remove time from a bottle

![Command](https://i.imgur.com/EKgzxNb.gif)

Grow wheat fast!

![Wheat](https://i.imgur.com/PRFEmJo.gif)

## Usage

First a "Time in a bottle" item is required.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/895919/description_0ebc21bb-f183-4a4b-9cac-606652d5f44d.png)

Once obtained, wait for the time to increase.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/895919/description_5b944f17-e86c-4a43-870e-c6d7d13ca3f4.png)

Once the time has increased, right click (Shift right click for blocks like the furnace), and the block has been sped up! Each click doubles the speed applied and will last 30 seconds.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/895919/description_e01b3af0-3e36-4b32-b593-c327a2d26cf6.png)

### Commands

There is one command that change add/remove time from a bottle

`/tiab <addTime/removeTime> <seconds>`

### Times required

For each "x2" 30 seconds of stored time is required. Each click requires the following time.

x2 - 30 seconds  
x4 - 30 seconds  
x8 - 60 seconds  
x16 - 120 seconds  
x32 - 240 seconds  
x64 - 480 seconds  
etc

## Configuration

The configuration file can be found in `<world folder>/serverconfig/tiab-server.toml`

```toml
#Max Stored Time Possible in ticks
max_stored_time = 622080000
#Ticks constant in ticks
ticks_const = 20
#Each use Duration in seconds
each_use_duration = 30
#Define maximum time the items can be used continuously. Corresponding to maximum times faster: Eg. 2^8=256
max_rate_multi = 8
```

## Notes

Only 1.20.1 and above is supported, for earlier versions use the mod this is a fork of [Time in a bottle standalone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/time-in-a-bottle-standalone).

If you wish to support me you can donate or subscribe to [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/user?u=3371834).

## Support

Support can be provided over the [discord server](https://discord.mangorage.org) or on the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/RealMangorage/time-in-a-bottle/issues)
